message:
chore: add 74 detailed task beads covering §5-§23 with full spec content

Comprehensive decomposition of remaining spec sections into granular
implementation tasks, each with full spec text excerpts in comments:

- §5 MVCC (21 beads): SSI witness objects, hot/cold plane discovery,
  coordinator IPC transport, write sequencers, deterministic rebase,
  physical merge policy, GC coordination, compatibility mode interop
- §12 SQL DML (11 beads): INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE with RETURNING and
  ON CONFLICT, SELECT with joins/subqueries/CTEs, VACUUM, PRAGMA
- §17 Testing (11 beads): unit tests, property tests, lab runtime,
  Mazurkiewicz traces, e-process invariant monitoring, fuzz specs
- §7 Integrity (12 beads): XXH3/CRC-32C/three-tier hash strategy,
  page-level integrity, WAL frame chain, double-write prevention
- §6 ARC Cache (9 beads): REPLACE/REQUEST algorithms, MVCC adaptation,
  eviction rules, version coalescing, snapshot visibility
- §14 Extensions (9 beads): FTS3/5 full-text search, R*-tree spatial
  indexing, JSON1, session/changeset, ICU collation
- §16 Phases (8 beads): implementation phase decomposition 5-9
- §13 Functions (8 beads): scalar, math, aggregate, window functions
- §10-§11 (14 beads): AST nodes, name resolution, code generation,
  database header, B-tree layout, varint, page size constraints
- §9 Traits (5 beads): storage traits, collation, authorization,
  function registry
- §8,§15,§18-§23 (15 beads): WAL, encryption, retry policy, risk
  register, summary pillars

Also updates 49 existing beads with new dependency edges and
parent-child relationships for proper task ordering.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
